description_long: This is a full drum kit featuring a large orange bass drum at the center, flanked by multiple black tom-toms and a snare drum. The kit is equipped with several metallic cymbals, including hi-hats, crash, and ride cymbals, all mounted on silver stands. The drumheads are white, contrasting with the black shells and the orange bass drum, and the hardware is rendered in a metallic silver color. The kit includes a drum stool and a visible bass drum pedal. The overall structure is compact, with all components closely arranged for easy access by a seated drummer. The set is suitable for live performances or street music in urban environments.
description: A detailed drum kit with an orange bass drum, black toms, white drumheads, and multiple metallic cymbals on silver stands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange bass drum, three black toms, and all cymbals arranged in a semi-circle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bass drum, the arrangement of the toms, and the overlapping cymbal stands.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white drumheads of the toms, the drum stool, and the pedal mechanism.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the bass drum, toms, and the spatial relationship between the cymbals and drums.
